description: Full-screen image lightbox overlay with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Escape), previous/next controls, counter display, and optional delete button.

parameters.name: ImageAlt
parameters.description: Alt text for the displayed image.

parameters.name: IsFirst
parameters.description: True when the current image is the first in the sequence.

parameters.name: IsLast
parameters.description: True when the current image is the last in the sequence.

parameters.name: CurrentIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of the currently displayed image.

parameters.name: TotalCount
parameters.description: Total number of images in the gallery.

parameters.name: CanDelete
parameters.description: When true, shows a delete button.

parameters.name: OnClose
parameters.description: Fires when the lightbox should be closed.

parameters.name: OnPrev
parameters.description: Fires when the user navigates to the previous image.

parameters.name: OnNext
parameters.description: Fires when the user navigates to the next image.

parameters.name: OnDelete
parameters.description: Fires when the delete button is clicked.

examples.title: Standalone lightbox
examples.code: <TmLightbox IsOpen="@showLightbox" ImageUrl="@currentUrl" ImageAlt="Photo" IsFirst="@isFirst" IsLast="@isLast" CurrentIndex="@index" TotalCount="@total" OnClose="@CloseLightbox" OnPrev="@GoToPrev" OnNext="@GoToNext" />

examples.title: Lightbox with delete
examples.code: <TmLightbox IsOpen="true" ImageUrl="/img/photo.jpg" ImageAlt="Vacation" IsFirst="false" IsLast="false" CurrentIndex="2" TotalCount="10" CanDelete="true" OnClose="@Close" OnPrev="@Prev" OnNext="@Next" OnDelete="@Delete" />
